title: ScoreResult Explanation Memory Analysis
description: Add and validate semantic reinforcement memory analysis mode sourced from production ScoreResult explanations where value='No'.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Requested enhancement captured: define lifecycle categories with semantics new=short&&!medium&&!long and trending=(short||medium)&&!long. Will require multi-window/history-aware classification beyond current recency-only hot/warm/cold tiers.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Completed this cycle: worst-to-best ordering shipped; full-scorecard ScoreResult-No run validated; lifecycle taxonomy added with explicit new/trending flags in report output. OpenSearch removal remains separately planned and not executed in this cycle.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Lifecycle taxonomy work is now in git commit dda649a5 on feature/reinforcement-memory; validated via report 73268d17-ca1b-4701-adf6-773b44c9e484.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implementation starting on a dedicated task: switching to feature/biblicus-reinforcement-memory, merging current dev into it, then adding ExplanationAnalysis as a separate report block over ScoreResult.explanation with Biblicus reinforcement-memory.
